label: p9_h3_rejected_full_attention_context_128_threads
hardware: local RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 24 GiB card; W7900 rerun unverified
change: Prototype launched qwen35_paged_full_attn_decode_context_tensor_kernel with 128 threads instead of 256 for the c=1 paged full-attention context path.
caveats: The exploratory run rebuilt the attention .so under rocprof despite require-cached; use the wall/token drift as reject evidence, not as a retained profiler measurement.
decision: Reject and revert: 128-thread context attention regressed local 512/16 decode 78.745 -> 69.739 tok/s and changed the generated tail/final token (38118 -> 220). Do not retry this launch-width change without a separate correctness oracle and prebuilt profiler run.
